widget.name: EdtsFormLogin
widget.description: Login form wrapper with draggable content and centered bottom action button.

property.caption: Show Header
property.description: Show the top navigation row.

property.caption: Back Caption
property.description: Caption for the top-left back action.

property.caption: Helper Caption
property.description: Optional top-right helper text.

property.caption: Title
property.description: Optional title above the content.

property.caption: Description
property.description: Optional description below the title.

property.caption: Content
property.description: Drag login input widgets into this content area.

property.caption: Submit Caption
property.description: Caption shown on the primary login button.

property.caption: Secondary Caption
property.description: Caption shown on the secondary action button.

property.caption: Show Secondary Button
property.description: Show or hide the secondary action button.

property.caption: Submit On Enter
property.description: Submit the form when Enter is pressed inside the wrapper.

property.caption: On Back
property.description: Action executed when the back caption is clicked.

property.caption: On Helper
property.description: Action executed when the helper caption is clicked.

property.caption: On Submit
property.description: Action executed when the login button is clicked or Enter is pressed.

property.caption: On Secondary
property.description: Action executed when the secondary button is clicked.

property.caption: Show Toast On Submit
property.description: Show a toast message when the submit button is clicked.

property.caption: Toast Message
property.description: Optional fallback message shown in the toast when the toast message attribute is empty.

property.caption: Toast Message Attribute
property.description: Optional string attribute used as the toast message. If empty, the static toast message is used.

property.caption: Toast Type
property.description: Visual type for the toast message.

property.caption: Toast Position
property.description: Where the toast will appear.

property.caption: Toast Auto Close
property.description: Auto close duration in milliseconds. Use 0 to keep the toast open.

property.caption: Compact Layout
property.description: Use tighter spacing for small modal layouts.
